details: The agent ran appropriate commands and correctly reported all three pieces of information: (1) open issue count of 9,237 (correctly extracted totalCount, not just page size), (2) 5 most recently merged PRs with accurate titles and authors matching the tool output (#52545/@hnshah, #54058/@byungsker, #53052/@VACInc, #53179/@nimbleenigma, #148/@cash-echo-bot), and (3) latest release tag v2026.3.23. All data is directly verified against the command outputs in the trajectory.
